pkgmetadata.longdescription: travis_ coveralls_ pypi_ womm_.. travis image httpsimg.shields.iotraviswimglennoyaml.svgbranchmaster.. _travis httpstravis-ci.orgwimglennoyaml.. coveralls image httpsimg.shields.iocoverallswimglennoyaml.svg.. _coveralls httpscoveralls.iogithubwimglennoyamlbranchmaster.. pypi image httpsimg.shields.iopypivoyaml.svg.. _pypi httpspypi.orgprojectoyaml.. womm image httpscdn.rawgit.comnikkuworks-on-my-machinev0.2.0badge.svg.. _womm httpsgithub.comnikkuworks-on-my-machineoyamloyaml is a drop-in replacement for PyYAML httppyyaml.orgwikiPyYAML_ which preserves dict ordering. Both Python 2 and Python 3 are supported. Just pip install oyaml, and import as shown below.. code-block python import oyaml as yamlYoull no longer be annoyed by screwed-up mappings when dumpingloading.
